chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.predicate: must contain at least one line item

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products to be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: IS_ACTIVE is a boolean flag indicating whether the entity is currently active and allowed to participate in its primary business activity (e.g., customers can place orders or products are for sale).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: Category is a business entity representing a classification of items, identified by a unique integer Category_ID and described by a Category_Name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | "Primary Key": CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_ID is the unique identifier for an order, typically implemented as a BIGINT primary key with auto-increment.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | "Primary Key": ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying the product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information. | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | "Description": Individual product lines within a sales order. | "Primary Key": LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | A Sales Order has one or more Order Li

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A self-referential foreign key column in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the ID of the parent category, enabling hierarchical categorization.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction record that settles a Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment ID, with attributes such as method, amount, timestamp, and status, and linked to exactly one Sales Order (though an order may have multiple Payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The human-readable label used to display the product in user interfaces, i.e., the product's display name attribute.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | "Primary Key": PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product in the e-commerce domain, represented by a unique SKU, a human-readable name, and a unit price, as part of the product catalog that customers browse and purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold | **Business Rules**:
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference | **Synonyms**: item, article, goods, merchandise, SKU | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | An Order Line Item references ex

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is the logistical record representing the transfer of goods from a source warehouse to a destination address, associated with exactly one sales order, identified by a unique shipment ID, and tracked by status, timestamps, and a tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └─

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master customer entity/table containing records for all registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID primary key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
"Description": Master record for all registered platform customers. | "Primary Key": CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | "Foreign Keys":
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: An address entity associated with a customer that represents the destination for shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A unique email address that serves as the login identifier for a customer or user account.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For Tax
entities_post_resolution.definition: Geographic region used to determine applicable tax calculations for a customer or transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation

entities_post_resolution.name: Master Record For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A per-order header data entity that stores the essential metadata for each customer's sales order (e.g., order identifier, date, and customer reference).
synonyms: Header record for each customer sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: "Description": Master record for all registered platform customers. | "Description": Header record for each customer sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: STATUS_CODE is a coded field representing the current status of an order or shipment in the fulfillment lifecycle (e.g., PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, region segmentation, account status, and the date the customer record was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores catalog information for products, including identifiers, pricing, category association, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about product categories, including each category's identifier, its name, and an optional reference to a parent category for hierarchical categorization.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation time, delivery time, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-item details for each order, including the associated order, product, quantity, unit price, and calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments associated with customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with customer orders, including identifiers, shipment timing, warehouse, tracking details, and current status.
